Secure .gov websites use HTTPS A lock ( A locked padlock ) or https:// means you’ve safely connected to the .gov website. Share sensitive information only on official, secure websites. It includes choosing healthy foods, getting more physical activity, aiming for a healthy weight, managing stress, quitting smoking, and getting enough good-quality sleep. View Heart-Healthy Living Health Topic View Heart-Healthy Living Coronary Heart Disease Sleep Apnea Blood Cholesterol Heart Inflammation Narcolepsy Heart Failure View All Topics Featured Areas of Research Discover research programs and initiatives that seek to inform prevention, diagnosis, and treatment for today’s major health challenges and conditions. Heart Failure NHLBI-supported research has contributed to heart failure treatments using breakthrough therapies. Learn more about heart failure research at NHLBI Data Science BioData Catalyst is a cloud-based ecosystem where researchers can analyze data related to NHLBI focus areas, like Long COVID, sickle cell disease, asthma, and heart disease. BioData Catalyst Research Asthma The goal of NHLBI-supported asthma research has been to discover better prevention and treatment options. Learn more about asthma research at NHLBI NHLBI Events Jan 20 Inflammation Associated HSC Senescence and Dysfunction in Blood and Cardiovascular Diseases Tue, Jan 20 Jan 26 Lung as the Gateway for Environmental Exposures Mon, Jan 26 Jan 29 Cardiopulmonary Complications of Hematopoietic Stem Cell Transplantation (HCT) and Gene Therapy Thu, Jan 29 View More Events NHLBI PUBLICATIONS The NHLBI has materials for patients and health professionals on many health topics, such as asthma, heart disease, and sickle cell disease. Search for NHLBI publications Our Mission The National Heart, Lung, and Blood Institute (NHLBI) provides global leadership for a research, training, and education program to promote the prevention and treatment of heart, lung, and blood disorders and enhance the health of all individuals so that they can live longer and more fulfilling lives.
